description: CompositionGrey V-neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with a buttoned flap and branding on the chestFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash with like colours in lukewarm water at 40 degreesDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool iron do not iron on decorationsSimple, understated and hot: that's the USP of the label roxy. The metallic colour on the front adds style to this super soft tee. Team it with jeans, capris or shorts, and look great without effort!Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
